claim: An explicit advisory domain hint should constrain candidate chips instead of acting only as extra free-text query terms.
mechanism: The advisory selector now filters the portfolio to chips whose domain/name matches the full hint or all of its tokens before relevance scoring. That keeps packaging-focused `chip-labs` advisories from consulting other `domain-chip-*` repos just because they share the generic token `chip`.
boundary: This only tightens the explicit-domain-hint path. Unhinted advisory ranking still depends on the broader relevance heuristic.
